subject: english
topic_title: Comprehension/Reading Skills: More on Skimming and Scanning
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Explain skimming as reading for gist
Explain scanning as reading for specific details
Apply both skills to comprehension passages

sections.heading: Skimming
sections.content: Skimming is rapid reading for the main ideas or gist of a text, paying attention to headings, sub-headings, and key points.

sections.heading: Scanning
sections.content: Scanning is the rapid and efficient search for specific words, facts, or details in a text.
